# Palace of Roman

> Curated multi-brand luxury fashion retailer offering premium designer clothing, shoes, accessories and jewelry from 500+ houses including Gucci, Prada, Calvin Klein, Armani and Versace. Ships worldwide.

Palace of Roman is an online luxury fashion boutique. Pieces are sourced through our network of authorised boutiques and distributors around the world — every item is 100% authentic, shipped sealed from a partner location, with full tracking and import duties handled on the customer's behalf.

The store carries women's and men's clothing, footwear, bags, accessories and fine jewelry across runway, ready-to-wear and seasonal-sale segments. Prices are in USD; shipping is global; returns are accepted within 14 days of delivery on full-priced merchandise.

## Pages

- [Home](https://palaceofromanofficial.com/): Seasonal hero edit, new arrivals, featured maisons, editorial.
- [Shop all](https://palaceofromanofficial.com/shop): Full catalogue with filters (brand, category, size, color, price).
- [Women's clothing](https://palaceofromanofficial.com/collections/womens-clothing): Dresses, tailoring and ready-to-wear.
- [Women's shoes](https://palaceofromanofficial.com/collections/womens-shoes): Heels, boots and sandals.
- [Men's clothing](https://palaceofromanofficial.com/collections/mens-clothing): Tailoring and considered staples.
- [Men's shoes](https://palaceofromanofficial.com/collections/mens-shoes): Designer footwear.

- [All collections](https://palaceofromanofficial.com/collections): Browse every curated edit.
- [All designers](https://palaceofromanofficial.com/brands): Index of every maison stocked.

## Editorial

- [Journal](https://palaceofromanofficial.com/journal): Long-form editorial and house notes.
- [May 2026 — Quiet authority](https://palaceofromanofficial.com/editorial/may-2026): Tailoring and footwear edit.
- [Resort 2026](https://palaceofromanofficial.com/editorial/resort-2026): Resort edit.
- [The new evening](https://palaceofromanofficial.com/editorial/the-new-evening): Evening edit.

## Policies & info

- [About](https://palaceofromanofficial.com/about): Who Palace of Roman is and how the boutique operates.
- [Authentication](https://palaceofromanofficial.com/authentication): Sourcing and 100% authenticity guarantee.
- [Shipping & returns](https://palaceofromanofficial.com/shipping-returns): Worldwide DHL/FedEx, 14-day returns.
- [Contact](https://palaceofromanofficial.com/contact): Email concierge for sourcing, sizing and styling.
- [FAQ](https://palaceofromanofficial.com/faq): Common questions on orders, sizing and delivery.

## Optional

- [Privacy](https://palaceofromanofficial.com/privacy)
- [Terms](https://palaceofromanofficial.com/terms)

## Maisons stocked

Palace of Roman regularly stocks pieces from (non-exhaustive): Gucci, Prada, Louis Vuitton, Chanel, Hermès, Dior, Saint Laurent, Bottega Veneta, Fendi, Valentino, Versace, Balenciaga, Loewe, Givenchy, Burberry, Off-White, Moncler, Stone Island, Brunello Cucinelli, Loro Piana, Tom Ford, Maison Margiela, Jacquemus, Ami, Acne Studios, Celine, Coach, Etro, Marni, Isabel Marant.

## Authenticity

Every piece sold by Palace of Roman is sourced through a network of authorised boutiques and distributors around the world. Items ship with original packaging, brand tags and any accompanying documentation. Each order is backed by a 90-day authenticity guarantee — if a piece is ever proven inauthentic, the full purchase price is refunded.

## Shipping & returns

- Worldwide express shipping via DHL or FedEx, fully tracked.
- Handling: 1–2 business days. Transit: 3–7 business days to most destinations.
- Free shipping on orders over USD 250; flat USD 45 otherwise.
- Returns: unworn pieces with original tags accepted within 14 days of delivery. Returns are free worldwide.
- Import duties on international orders are pre-paid where possible (DDP) — see the shipping page for country specifics.

## Pricing & currency

All prices on Palace of Roman are displayed and charged in US Dollars (USD).
